ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., dragstart, drag, dragenter) */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target element for the event (e.g., source node, immediate user selection) */,
  "cancelable" INTEGER /* Whether the event is cancelable */,
  "drag_data_store_mode" TEXT /* Mode for storing drag data (e.g., read/write, protected) */,
  "drop_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the drop operation (e.g., none, based on effectAllowed value) */,
  "default_action" TEXT /* Default action for the event (e.g., initiate, continue, reject) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event */,
  "event_context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata about the event */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate whether the event was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_drag_data_store_mode FOREIGN KEY ("drag_data_store_mode") REFERENCES drag_data_store_modes ("mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_target FOREIGN KEY ("target") REFERENCES targets ("target_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_default_action FOREIGN KEY ("default_action") REFERENCES default_actions ("action_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_drop_effect FOREIGN KEY ("drop_effect") REFERENCES drop_effects ("effect_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "drag_data_store_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode (e.g., read/write, protected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this mode is the default mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mode was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drop_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the effect (e.g., none, based on effectAllowed value) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the effect */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this effect is the default effect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the effect was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., initiate, continue, reject) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this action is the default action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, developer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_targets" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target element */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message describing the event */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata about the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., allow, deny) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "event_id")
)
